action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch with 2 hours and 30 iterations. Need to build a 3D GNN for HOMO-LUMO gap prediction. Analysis: 3D geometric methods achieve much better MAE (~0.03-0.06 eV) than SMILES methods. PyG is available, so I'll implement a custom SchNet-style model for reliability. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py. Train for 3 epochs on iteration 0 to establish baseline and measure pipeline speed.
